decision_points.description: Host strain is a T7 RNA polymerase-carrying E. coli (BL21(DE3) or close derivative).

citations.title: Recombinant protein expression in Escherichia coli: advances and challenges
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed review establishing BL21(DE3) and derivatives as canonical T7 expression hosts.

decision_points.description: IPTG concentration is within the 0.1-1 mM canonical induction range.

citations.title: Recombinant protein expression in Escherichia coli: advances and challenges
citations.tier_justification: Rosano 2014 establishes 0.1-1 mM as the canonical IPTG induction range.

decision_points.description: Induction OD600 is in the 0.4-0.8 mid-log window.

citations.title: Recombinant protein expression in Escherichia coli: advances and challenges

decision_points.description: Induction temperature is in the standard set of {18, 25, 30, 37} C.

citations.title: Recombinant protein expression in Escherichia coli: advances and challenges
citations.tier_justification: Rosano 2014 recommends 37 C short induction or 18-25 C overnight induction.

decision_points.description: Lysis buffer pH is in the 7.0-8.0 Ni-NTA-compatible window.

citations.title: QIAGEN QIAexpressionist Handbook (5th ed.)
citations.tier_justification: QIAexpressionist handbook recommends pH 7.0-8.0 for Ni-NTA-compatible lysis buffers.

wrong_host_strain.canonical_diagnosis: Host strain lacks T7 RNA polymerase; pET / T7-driven IPTG induction requires BL21(DE3) or a (DE3) derivative.
acceptable_variants: Only T7-RNAP carrying hosts such as BL21(DE3) can drive the pET-based induction used here.
The chosen strain is not a lambda DE3 lysogen; IPTG induction cannot proceed.

citations.title: Recombinant protein expression in Escherichia coli: advances and challenges

wrong_induction_temperature.canonical_diagnosis: Induction temperature was outside the accepted 18 / 25 / 30 / 37 C set; expression is inefficient.
acceptable_variants: Induce at 37 C short, or 18-25 C overnight; neither window was used.
The chosen induction temperature does not match any standard IPTG induction protocol.

citations.title: Recombinant protein expression in Escherichia coli: advances and challenges

wrong_lysis_ph.canonical_diagnosis: Lysis buffer pH was outside the 7.0-8.0 Ni-NTA-compatible window.
acceptable_variants: Ni-NTA binding requires pH 7-8; the chosen lysis pH is incompatible.
Lysis pH outside 7-8 will compromise Ni-NTA His-tag capture.
